message:
skill-loop pass 7/10: simplify storage message paths

Extracts the repeated YYYY/MM/filename suffix assembly in message_paths into a local dated_file closure. Canonical, outbox, and inbox base paths, validation order, BCC redaction, message rendering, rel-path collection, and git enqueue behavior are unchanged. Verified with fmt, diff check, focused storage message bundle tests, storage check/clippy, and UBS review.

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 # Total Passes: 10
 # Started: 2026-04-25T01:08:13Z
 
-## Status: IN PROGRESS - Pass 7 of 10
+## Status: IN PROGRESS - Pass 8 of 10
 
 ## Architecture Summary
 - Workspace is a Rust 2024 Cargo workspace with strict layering: `core` owns config/models/errors/metrics; `db` owns SQLite schema/query/cache/search persistence; `storage` owns Git archive and commit coalescing; `tools` owns the MCP tool implementations; `server` owns stdio/HTTP dispatch, TUI/web/ATC/runtime workers; `cli` owns `am`, robot mode, operator commands, gates, E2E, and benchmarks.
@@ -73,3 +73,11 @@
 - Verification: worker fresh-eyes inspection completed; `cargo fmt --check`; `git diff --check`; `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-db sync_reconstructed_message_recipients_json --locked`; `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-db --all-targets`; `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-db --all-targets -- -D warnings`; `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/reconstruct.rs` reported 0 critical findings.
 - Commit: `676d3981`.
 - Verdict: PRODUCTIVE.
+
+### Pass 7 - Storage Path Construction - 2026-04-25T02:57:00Z
+- Files changed: `crates/mcp-agent-mail-storage/src/lib.rs`.
+- Changes: added a local `dated_file` closure inside `message_paths` and reused it for canonical, outbox, and inbox paths so each base appends the same `YYYY/MM/<filename>.md` suffix in one place.
+- Preservation notes: canonical/outbox/inbox base directories are unchanged; sender validation still happens before archive root lookup; recipient validation still happens inside the recipient loop; message rendering, BCC redaction, rel-path collection, Git enqueue, and write ordering were untouched.
+- Verification: worker fresh-eyes inspection passed and corrected the artifact scoring; `cargo fmt --check`; `git diff --check`; `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-storage test_write_message_bundle --locked`; `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-storage --all-targets`; `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-storage --all-targets -- -D warnings`; `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-storage/src/lib.rs` completed with existing file-wide panic/test-warning inventory, while fmt/clippy/check/test subchecks were clean and none of the critical findings touched the changed `message_paths` lines.
+- Commit: pending.
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE.

@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+# Pass 7 - Storage Path Construction
+
+## Files Changed
+- `crates/mcp-agent-mail-storage/src/lib.rs`
+- `refactor/artifacts/2026-04-25-silentoriole-simplify/pass-07-storage-path-construction.md`
+
+## Candidate
+- Type II clone in `message_paths`: canonical, outbox, and each inbox path all
+  appended the same `YYYY/MM/<filename>.md` suffix after selecting different
+  archive base directories.
+- Score: `(LOC_saved 2 * Confidence 5) / Risk 1 = 10.0`.
+
+## Simplification
+- Added one local `dated_file` closure inside `message_paths`.
+- Replaced repeated `.join(&y).join(&m).join(&filename)` chains with calls to
+  `dated_file(base)`.
+
+## Isomorphism Card
+- Inputs covered: `message_paths` callers through the focused
+  `test_write_message_bundle` filter, including canonical, outbox, inbox,
+  BCC-redacted inbox, body preservation, path traversal rejection, unsafe extra
+  path rejection, and forged-root guards.
+- Ordering preserved: yes. `message_paths` still constructs canonical, then
+  outbox, then inbox paths in recipient order. `append_message_bundle_files`
+  write order is unchanged.
+- Error semantics: unchanged. Sender validation still happens before archive
+  root lookup and recipient validation still happens inside the recipient loop
+  before each inbox path is built.
+- BCC redaction: unchanged. Only path construction changed; message rendering
+  and inbox redaction code were not touched.
+- Git write ordering: unchanged. No commit coalescer, rel path, or enqueue code
+  was modified.
+- On-disk paths: unchanged. Each base path is the same as before, and the shared
+  helper appends the same `year/month/filename` suffix.
+- Observable side effects: unchanged. No logs, commits, archive writes, or
+  message bundle content generation changed.
+
+## Verification
+- `cargo fmt --check`
+- `git diff --check`
+- `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-storage test_write_message_bundle --locked`
+
+## Proof Limits
+- Full workspace tests and golden-output hashing were not rerun for this pass:
+  the simplification loop baseline already records pre-existing red workspace
+  failures, and this pass was intentionally bounded to the storage path suffix
+  cleanup.
+- Preservation was verified by source-diff inspection plus focused storage
+  message-bundle tests that cover the affected path construction, validation,
+  BCC redaction, forged-root guards, and message body content.
